steps.title: Map lesson to response
steps.content: The first sentence gives the lesson from the Human Genome Project: genes are affected by interactions with proteins. The next sentence describes researchers responding by studying the proteome too.

steps.title: Reject wrong transition roles
steps.content:
• Choice A: In other words would signal a restatement, but the second sentence gives a consequence.
  • Choice B: That said would signal contrast.
  • Choice C: For example would make the research shift only an illustration.

steps.title: Choose the consequence signal
steps.content: The transition must show that proteome research follows logically from the lesson about gene-protein interactions. The answer is D.
